practices.title: Drip irrigation scheduling
practices.content: Estimate ETc = ETo x Kc; run drip to replace 100% ETc in peak; reduce 20-30% in cool cloudy periods. Pulse irrigation on sandy soils.

practices.title: Rice water management AWD
practices.content: Alternate wetting and drying can save water vs continuous flooding while maintaining yield if soils allow.

practices.title: Critical irrigation stages wheat
practices.content: CRI, tillering, jointing, flowering, milk: missing CRI causes largest yield loss.

practices.title: Onion bulb development water
practices.content: Uniform moisture during bulbing reduces doubles and splits; stop irrigation 10-15 days pre-harvest.

practices.title: Pomegranate stress for bahar
practices.content: Withhold water 30-45 days then resume with fertigation to force uniform bahar.

practices.title: Sugarcane grand growth water
practices.content: Peak water demand in grand growth; mulching reduces evaporation.

practices.title: Sprinkler for groundnut
practices.content: Light frequent sprinkler helps pegging soils stay moist without crusting.

practices.title: Farm pond + drip integration
practices.content: Lift from farm pond to sand filter to drip; chlorinate if algae clog emitters.
